summary: Tested new features: 1) Feedback/Bug Report system - submit button in header, modal with 4 types (bug/error/suggestion/complaint), validation, MongoDB storage, email_sent=false (SMTP not configured). 2) Broker Test Connection - full credential validation dry-run for each broker with required_fields, format_validation, adapter_available checks showing PASS/FAIL/WARN statuses color-coded.
seed_data_creation: Feedback reports created during testing (type=bug, error with subject 'Test Bug Report')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beta registration modal is DISABLED in App.tsx. Dashboard loads directly. SMTP is not configured (placeholders in .env), so email_sent will always be false. All 6 brokers have 'Coming Soon' status with supported=false. Broker test connection validates credentials format but shows 'partial' since live adapters are not implemented.

POST /api/feedback.validation_invalid_type: 400 - Type must be one of: bug, error, suggestion, complaint

dashboard_loads_directly.note: Beta registration modal is DISABLED/commented out in App.tsx

mocked_api_note: SMTP email service is configured with empty placeholder credentials in backend/.env, so emails are not actually sent (email_sent: false). Feedback data is still stored in MongoDB.
email_service_status: SMTP_HOST, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASSWORD, SMTP_RECIPIENT are all empty placeholders - emails will NOT be sent
